# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover Rooted in Love, a heartfelt motherhood lifestyle brand offering indigenous-inspired creative products, free printable art, and gentle parenting wisdom for mothers raising sacred children.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how Anastacia, mother of two, created Rooted in Love to celebrate the beautiful chaos of motherhood through indigenous-inspired themes and love-centered parenting.

### Offerings
https://example.com/offerings
Browse our collection of soft, feminine lifestyle products featuring delicate feather line art, strawberry vines, and botanical illustrations designed for mothers seeking peaceful inspiration.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Reach out to Rooted in Love and join a community of mothers embracing gentle strength, sacred roots, and the beautiful journey of raising children with intention and love.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
